entries.source: "Make a 7-day review plan"
entries.value: "Ṣe 7-ọjọ́ àtúnyẹ̀wò ètò"

entries.source: "Quiz me on vocabulary again"
entries.value: "Quiz mi lórí ọ̀rọ̀ again"

entries.source: "Review yesterday's chemistry"
entries.value: "Àtúnyẹ̀wò yesterday's chemistry"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Spaced Review on inspir for practice learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Ìtọ́sọ́nà tó wúlò fún lílo Àtúnyẹ̀wò Pẹ̀lú Àárín lórí inspir fún ẹ̀kọ́ adaṣe, pẹ̀lú àwọn ìbéèrè, àwọn ìyípo ẹ̀kọ́, àti àwọn ìwà AI tó ní ààbò síi.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Lágbára síi ìyípo ẹ̀kọ́

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal.
entries.value: Mú ìpàdé náà bá àfojúsùn rẹ mu.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI olùkọ́

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Béèrè fún small àkọ́kọ́ ìgbésẹ̀ dípò ìdáhùn ìkẹyìn.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Béèrè AI láti ṣàyẹ̀wò tirẹ ìrònú, kì í ṣe kan èsì.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Finish nípasẹ̀ kíkọ èrò back láti ìrántí.

entries.source: Learners exploring practice topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ tí wọ́n ń ṣàwárí àwọn kókó-ẹ̀kọ́ ìdánwò tí wọ́n fẹ́ ìtọ́sọ́nà tó wúlò dípò àpótí ìdáhùn lásán.

entries.source: Practice
entries.value: Ṣe adaṣe

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Àwọn ìbéèrè láti gbìmọ̀ wò

entries.source: Review before you forget.
entries.value: Àtúnyẹ̀wò kí ìwọ forget.

entries.source: Spaced Review
entries.value: Àtúnyẹ̀wò Tí A Pín Sákókò

entries.source: Spaced Review AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Plan and run quick review sessions that strengthen long-term memory.
entries.value: Àtúnyẹ̀wò pẹ̀lú àárín ipo ẹ̀kọ́ AI jẹ́ ọ̀nà tó dojú kọ lílo AI fún ẹ̀kọ́ dípò kíkó ìdáhùn jọ lọ́nà aláìṣiṣẹ́. A kọ́ ipo náà yí iṣẹ́ kan pato ká: Ètò àti run quick àtúnyẹ̀wò sessions yẹn strengthen long-term ìrántí.

entries.source: Spaced Review AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Àtúnyẹ̀wò pẹ̀lú àárín ipo ẹ̀kọ́ AI: ìtọ́sọ́nà tó wúlò

entries.source: Start the live mode at Spaced Review. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Concept Map Builder. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ taara ipo ní Spaced àtúnyẹ̀wò. bí ìwọ fẹ́ neighboring ẹ̀kọ́ fọ́ọ̀mù, gbìyànjú máàpù èrò Olùkọ́. fún gbooro síi ìwòye ti pẹpẹ, ka kí AI ẹ̀kọ́ alábàákẹ́kọ̀ọ́ yẹ kí ṣe fún gbogbo ènìyàn.

entries.source: Start with example prompts.
entries.value: Bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú example àwọn ìbéèrè.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell ipo kí ìwọ jẹ́ trying láti kọ́ tàbí produce.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Yẹn ìyàtọ̀ fi hàn up nínú ìṣàn. Instead ti one giant ìdáhùn, tó dára jù àwọn ìpàdé lọ nípasẹ̀ ìyípo: set àfojúsùn, gbìyànjú ohun kan, gba ìdáhùn, túnṣe aláìlera spot, àti yan tó kàn ìgbésẹ̀.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Yẹn focus ṣe pàtàkì. general chatbot lè ìdáhùn fẹ́rẹ̀ẹ́ anything, ṣùgbọ́n ẹ̀kọ́ ipo gives ìjíròrò shape. ó nudges ìwọ toward irú ti thinking, adaṣe, ìdáhùn, tàbí ìṣàwárí yẹn ràn lọ́wọ́ èrò stick.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Yìí jẹ́ kan náà ìṣe àṣà lẹ́yìn studying pẹ̀lú AI láìsí jìyà ara rẹ: pa mọ́ akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ active. AI jẹ́ jù wúlò nígbà tí ó gives ìwọ ìdáhùn lórí tirẹ thinking.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Yìí ipo jẹ́ pàápàá wúlò fún àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ta fẹ́ láti:

entries.source: This mode is tuned for spaced review with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Yìí ipo jẹ́ tuned fún spaced àtúnyẹ̀wò pẹ̀lú tirẹ̀ own àwọn ìbéèrè, àwọn àpẹẹrẹ, àti ẹ̀kọ́ ìṣàn.

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Gbìmọ̀ wò ìgbésẹ̀ ní ọ̀rọ̀ tirẹ.

entries.source: Use Spaced Review when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Lo Àtúnyẹ̀wò Pẹ̀lú Àárín nígbà tí Ìwọ fẹ́ ìpàdé yẹn bẹ̀rẹ̀ yarayara ṣùgbọ́n síbẹ̀ adapts láti ìwọ. àkọ́kọ́ àfojúsùn jẹ́ kì í ṣe láti sound impressive. àkọ́kọ́ àfojúsùn jẹ́ láti ṣe tó kàn ìgbésẹ̀ feel ṣeé ṣe.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Kí yìí ipo ń ràn lọ́wọ́ pẹ̀lú

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Ibo láti go tó kàn

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Ìwọ lè pẹ̀lú bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú àkọ́kọ́ ẹ̀dà ti tirẹ gidi ìṣòro. rúdurùdu àkọ́kọ́ ìbéèrè jẹ́ fine. ìpàdé lè clarify ìpele, olùgbọ́, àkókò ipari, àti style once ìwọ begin.
